description: Well cushioned and lightweight, the running shoes are designed to offer a comfortable running experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic upper for maximum durability Synthetic overlays for durability, added structure to the heel support Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefoot Velcro straps for snug Fit Padded tongue with synthetic upper overlay for durability and meshed fabric lining below for comfort and breathability Cushioned sock liner for in step comfort and snug fit Brand name on side and tongue    Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with vertical flex grooves for maximum support Acupressure points below the forefoot area for superior traction Slip resistant heel patch on the outsole shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
